title: E2E golden file tests for graph and cascade features
description:
New e2e reference test cases in e2etests/reference/:
- case_NN_graph_basic.go: graph output for simple parent hierarchy with tree rendering
- case_NN_graph_cross_parent.go: cross-parent blocking visualization with waves
- case_NN_cascade_ready.go: ready command respecting inherited parent blocking (cascade=true vs false)
- case_NN_auto_close.go: auto-close parent on last child close, multi-level recursion

Generate expected output with make update-e2e. Commit the expected/*.txt files. Validate with make test-e2e. See CLAUDE.md for golden file test conventions.
